notes: Positive rows carry source_dataset; matched controls need equivalent owner/export identifier.
V62 request does not require report section, appendix id, or row block locator.
V62 control file does not require symbol even though matching_dimensions may describe it.
Controls need explicit venue/market center, not only narrative matching dimensions.
Do not fabricate participant fields; owner export must provide them or verifier contract must be amended.
Order side is required by the current verifier and absent from V62 required fields.
Positive event_start can map only if it is the earliest order timestamp.
Positive event_end can map only if it is the latest order timestamp.
The current verifier requires order_count; V62 does not.
The current verifier requires total_order_quantity; V62 does not.
Do not derive without explicit timezone/session policy in provenance.
